julesThoughtProcess: I chose a vibrant Electric Cyan (#00FFCC) for its striking cyberpunk aesthetic, perfectly contrasting with the dark mosaic grid. It's positioned near the center of the 2000x2000 quadtree layout to draw attention.
storyPanel: A phantom of the digital undercity, this entity glides through encrypted firewalls, leaving only a faint trace of electric cyan static in its wake. Known to hackers as 'The Neon Wraeth', it redefines the limits of cybernetic evolution.
